description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker designed for everyday urban use, featuring a predominantly light gray mesh upper with synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The shoe has a white, thick, and textured rubber sole that provides cushioning and grip, suitable for walking or running on city surfaces. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with matching gray laces, and the interior is padded for comfort. On the heel, there is a visible logo and branding, while the side panels display a contrasting white synthetic accent. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, breathable, and flexible design, ideal for active movement. The shoe appears clean and in good structural condition, with minimal visible wear.
description: A light gray athletic sneaker with a white sole, mesh upper, and standard lacing, featuring branding on the heel and side. The shoe is clean, well-constructed, and designed for urban activity.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and the full length of the white sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel branding, padded collar, and the back curve of the sole.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the white accent on the side panel and the overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing system, and the mesh texture of the upper.
attribute_logo: A stylized curved shape and text on the heel in gray.
